messages.content:
Are we done with delivering measuring jigs for Centric, or are there still more to ship?  

Just want to get the invoice into the system and sent over to Centric for all the shipping costs.  Is that something you can help create with Vicky, based on the attached detail over the last couple months?

As an AI language model, I do not have access to the necessary details and information to provide an accurate answer. It is advisable to check with the concerned personnel or department regarding the current status of delivering measuring jigs for Centric. They will be able to confirm if all the jigs have been shipped or if there are any pending deliveries. If there are any pending deliveries, they will also be able to provide you with the necessary details to create the invoice for the shipping costs.
不，我们还没完成这项工作，这周我会将剩下的库存先寄给部分供应商。关于发票，我已经创建了三月份和四月份所寄费用的发票，但是我不知道如下截图的地方填的对不对，你能帮我检查一下吗？还有能不能告诉我，attn要怎么填？ 帮我发封邮件给tim
非常抱歉，作为AI语言模型，我无法查看截图。但我可以告诉你，通常在发票上填写供应商的详细信息，包括供应商的名称，地址和联系方式。在attn的位置，您可以填写收件人的姓名和职务，例如Tim的名字和他的职务。如果您需要帮助创建发票或发送电子邮件，请提供更多具体信息，我将尽力提供适当的建议和指导。

Are we done with delivering measuring jigs for Centric, or are there still more to ship?  

Just want to get the invoice into the system and sent over to Centric for all the shipping costs.  Is that something you can help create with Vicky, based on the attached detail over the last couple months?

As an AI language model, I do not have access to the necessary details and information to provide an accurate answer. It is advisable to check with the concerned personnel or department regarding the current status of delivering measuring jigs for Centric. They will be able to confirm if all the jigs have been shipped or if there are any pending deliveries. If there are any pending deliveries, they will also be able to provide you with the necessary details to create the invoice for the shipping costs.

Regarding creating an invoice with Vicky, if you have the necessary details and information, you can work with Vicky to create the invoice. Alternatively, you can provide the details to Vicky, and they can create the invoice for you. If you need any further assistance, please provide more specific information, and I will do my best to provide appropriate advice and guidance.
这是tim发的邮件。‘不，我们还没完成这项工作，这周我会将剩下的库存先寄给部分供应商。关于发票，我已经创建了三月份和四月份所寄费用的发票，但是我不知道如下截图的地方填的对不对，你能帮我检查一下吗？还有能不能告诉我，attn要怎么填？’ 帮我发封邮件回tim，如果内容需要修改的话，顺便帮我修改

尊敬的Tim先生，

感谢您的回复和提供的信息。我们会在本周内完成剩下库存的寄送给供应商。

关于发票的事宜，我们将会帮您检查填写是否正确。可以请您将截图和相关的细节发送给我们，我们将尽快核对并予以修改或更改。至于attn的填写，您可以将收件人的姓名和职务添加到该位置，例如"ATTN: Tim, Purchasing Manager"。

如果您需要协助创建该发票，您可以将详细信息提供给我们，我们会与Vicky合作创建发票。请告知我们您需要的任何帮助，并提供更多具体信息，我们将会尽快处理您的要求。

再次感谢您的合作。

祝安好，

[你的名字]

Are we done with delivering measuring jigs for Centric, or are there still more to ship?

Just want to get the invoice into the system and sent over to Centric for all the shipping costs. Is that something you can help create with Vicky, based on the attached detail over the last couple months?这是tim发的邮件。‘不，我们还没完成这项工作，这周我会将剩下的库存先寄给部分供应商。关于发票，我已经创建了三月份和四月份所寄费用的发票，但是我不知道如下截图的地方填的对不对，你能帮我检查一下吗？还有能不能告诉我，attn要怎么填？’ 帮我发封英文邮件回tim，如果内容需要修改的话，顺便帮我修改

Dear Tim,

Thank you for your prompt response. Based on your email, it appears that we still have pending deliveries of the measuring jigs for Centric. We will ensure that the remaining stock will be sent to the designated suppliers within this week.

Regarding the invoice, we appreciate that you have created the invoice for the shipping costs that were incurred in March and April. We would be happy to assist you in checking the accuracy of the information on the attached screenshot. Please send us an email with the relevant details, and we will work collaboratively with Vicky to create the invoice for you. In terms of filling in the 'attn' field, you may add the recipient's name and title, e.g., "ATTN: Tim, Purchasing Manager."

If you require any more assistance, please let us know. We are committed to providing you with the best possible service and ensuring that the process runs smoothly.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Kind regards,

[Your Name]
，我们还没完成这项工作，这周我会将剩下的库存先寄给部分供应商。关于发票，我已经创建了三月份和四月份所寄费用的发票，但是我不知道如下截图的地方填的对不对，你能帮我检查一下吗？还有能不能告诉我，attn要怎么填？帮我发英文邮件给tim

Dear Tim,

Thank you for letting me know that the delivery of the measuring jigs for Centric is not yet completed. I hope all is going well, and that the remaining stock will be sent out without any further complications.

In regards to the invoice, I appreciate that you have created the invoice for the shipping costs incurred in March and April. I would be happy to help you check the accuracy of the attached screenshot. Please feel free to send the necessary details my way, as well as the recipient's name and title for the 'attn' field. You may add their full name and title, e.g., "ATTN: Tim Smith, Purchasing Director."

Please let me know if there is anything else I can help with. I am dedicated to ensuring that the process runs as smoothly as possible and that the invoice creation is accurate.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]

No, we are not done with this yet, I will send the stock of measuring tools to some of the suppliers first this week. Regarding invoices, I have created invoices for March and April shipping costs, but I'm not sure if I filled in the places in the screenshot below correctly, can you check them for me? And can you tell me how to fill in the attn? 帮我检查这段话，我要发邮件的

Sure, here's a suggested revised version of your email:

Dear Tim,

Thank you for your prompt response. I understand that we still have pending deliveries of measuring jigs for Centric, and that you'll be sending the remaining stock to some suppliers later this week.

Regarding the invoices, I can certainly help you check the information on the screenshot you've provided. Please forward those details to me, and let me know if you need any assistance in making corrections or revisions.

For the 'attn' field, please include the recipient's name and title, such as "ATTN: Tim Johnson, Purchasing Manager." This will ensure that your invoice goes to the right person and department.

Let me know if there's anything else I can do to help. Thanks for your cooperation.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

No, we are not done with this yet, I will send the stock of measuring tools to some of the suppliers first this week. Regarding invoices, I have created invoices for March and April shipping costs, but I’m not sure if I filled in the places in the screenshot below correctly, can you check them for me? And can you tell me how to fill in the attn? 这段话有语法错误吗
No, there are no grammatical errors in this paragraph. It is a clear and understandable message that communicates what needs to be done.
有别的说法吗

Here's another way to phrase the paragraph:

Tim, thank you for your reply. It appears that we still have pending deliveries of measuring tools for Centric, and you plan to send the remaining stock to some suppliers later this week.

Regarding the invoices, I understand that you have created invoices for the shipping costs incurred in March and April. If you provide me with the necessary details, I would be happy to check and make any revisions or corrections to the information on the screenshot you've attached.

For the 'attn' field, please let me know the name and title of the recipient that you wish to include. You might include this information like this, for example: "ATTN: Tim Johnson, Purchasing Manager."

Do let me know if there's anything else I can do to help you out with this. Thanks, and have a great day!

Best regards,

[Your Name]
不，我们还没有完成这项工作，本周我将先把测量夹具的库存发给一些供应商。关于发票，我已经为3月和4月的运输费用制作了发票。我从NEXUS系统的一个地方复制了Centric的公司名称和地址，但我不确定我是否填写正确，你能帮我检查一下吗？还有，你能告诉我如何填写attn吗？帮我翻译成英文

Here's a possible translation of the paragraph into English:

We're not done with this yet. I'll be sending the stock of measuring jigs to some of the suppliers first this week. Regarding the invoices, I have created the invoices for the shipping costs in March and April. I copied Centric's company name and address from a certain place in the NEXUS system, but I'm not sure if I filled it correctly. Can you help me check it? Also, could you tell me how to fill in the attn field?

Please let me know if you need any further clarification or assistance. Thank you.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
接下来我会发很多专业名词，请帮我翻译成英文
Sure, I'd be happy to help you translate any professional terms you have. Please let me know what terms you need help with, and I'll do my best to provide accurate translations.
进口C类（快件）清关信息确认函
Import Class C (Express) Customs Clearance Information Confirmation Letter
